meaning: adj.地球动力学的adj.地球动力学的
examples: Seismological and geodynamical evidences supported whole mantle convection model, while geochemical ones supported layered convection model.
The REE geochemical research has provided the important evidence for the mechanism of the Premian post-collision stage and the geodynamical evolution process.
Temperature measurements and its long-period observation will provide reliable basic data for geothermal and geodynamical study of the ultra-high pressure metamorphic belt.
